# UC-19.3.9 · oVirt / RHV Administrator Login and Privileged Action Audit Trail

## Description

RHV audits capture who changed clusters, storage, and VM definitions. Scheduled reporting on high-risk verbs supports SOX/ISO access reviews and speeds insider-threat investigations when VMs move unexpectedly.

## Value

Produces defensible evidence of administrative changes without relying solely on the Engine UI history pane.

## Implementation

Ingest `audit.log` with a LINE_BREAKER suited to Java logging. Extract `user` and action tokens. Feed summaries to a summary index for 400-day retention if required by policy. Alert on after-hours `LOGIN` from non-jump-host IPs.

## SPL

```spl
index=virtualization sourcetype="ovirt:audit" earliest=-24h
| where action="LOGIN" OR action="LOGOUT" OR like(action, "ADD_%") OR like(action, "REMOVE_%") OR like(action, "UPDATE_%") OR like(lower(action), "%vm%") OR like(lower(action), "%host%")
| stats count by user, action, object_type, object_name
| sort -count
| head 100
```

## Visualization

Table (top actions), Timeline (admin events), Pie chart (action categories).

## References

- [Red Hat Virtualization — Audit Log](https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_virtualization/4.4/html/administration_guide/sect-audit_log)
